electromagnetic.key_result: alpha_inverse inside selected one-sigma diagnostic reference

electroweak.key_result: M_W, M_Z, and G_F all inside selected one-sigma diagnostics

neutrino.key_result: normal ordering, m_beta, and m_beta_beta stable and below current direct bounds

strong.key_result: alpha3 anchor compatible at sub-0.04 percent; asymptotic freedom sign locked

anomaly_registry.key_result: local anomalies cancel per generation, Witten anomaly absent, residual U(1)em vectorlike

no_fit_provenance.key_result: forbidden inputs excluded; diagnostic references post-generation only

safe_manuscript_statement: PR-III extends the PR-I/PR-II projection ledger into a cross-sector radiative, electroweak, neutrino, and strong consistency program whose generated outputs pass the current diagnostic and structural audits recorded here, without using the corresponding diagnostic targets as generation inputs.
unsafe_claim_excluded: PR-III proves a complete exact all-orders theory of the Standard Model and QCD.
remaining_obligations: all-orders alpha theorem or higher-order residual proof
additive Majorana seed derivation or exclusion
higher-loop strong running branch and scheme audit
confinement/hadronization as a separate PR module
final manuscript consolidation and reproducibility package
